seo.title: Finch-AI — Custom AI Solutions for SMEs
seo.description: Finch-AI builds tailored artificial intelligence that adapts to your processes and grows with your business: OmniFlow, Document Intelligence, Finance Intelligence and Synapse. Live in days, not months.
seo.keywords: AI for SMEs, custom AI solutions, business process automation AI, document intelligence software, financial analysis AI, knowledge management AI, OmniFlow, Synapse
seo.orgDescription: Tailored artificial intelligence that adapts and grows with small and mid-sized businesses: OmniFlow, Document Intelligence, Finance Intelligence and Synapse.

hero.tag: Enterprise AI for small & mid-sized businesses
hero.title:
Artificial
intelligence that works
like your business.
hero.sub: Finch-AI builds tailored artificial intelligence that adapts to your processes and grows together with your business. From ready-made modules to an agent built around you — live in days, not months.

value.title:
The bridge between your business
and artificial intelligence.
value.lead: The most advanced AI engines change every month. Your business doesn't. Finch-AI sits in between: it connects your processes, documents and numbers to the right artificial intelligence — wherever it lives, even inside your own walls — and puts it to work for you.
value.cell1Text: Turn on only what you need, when you need it. Each module works on its own or integrates with the others, without rewriting your processes.
value.cell2Title: The best of AI, at your service
value.cell2Text: We pick and connect the AI engines that fit you best — in the cloud or on-premise. Nothing changes for you: only the result does. And your data stays in Europe.
value.cell3Text: Not static software: the AI learns from your work, improves over time and grows with your company. Live in days, never an endless project.

omniflow.name: OmniFlow
omniflow.desc: The operational core. It orchestrates orders, invoices, inventory and workflows with a copilot that understands natural-language requests and acts on your behalf.
feats: Conversational copilot on your management system
Integration with the systems you already use

document.name: Document Intelligence
document.desc: It reads, classifies and extracts data from invoices, contracts, delivery notes and emails. It turns paper and PDFs into structured, ready-to-use information.

finance.name: Finance Intelligence
finance.desc: It gives you visibility into the future: forecast cash flow, margins by customer and product, real-time KPIs. Management decides on numbers, not gut feeling.
feats: Automatic alerts on margins and overdue payments

synapse.name: Synapse
synapse.desc: Your company's documental brain. It turns scattered documents, emails, contracts and conversations into a living, self-maintaining wiki — with every answer cited back to its source.

aps.name: APS
aps.desc: Advanced Planning System: plan and optimize manufacturing production with advanced algorithms and a natural-language conversational interface, without the complexity.
feats: Integration with existing ERP and MES

tailored.title:
The modules are
the starting point.
tailored.lead: No two companies are alike. That's why Finch-AI doesn't just sell licenses: we design and build artificial intelligence around your processes, your documents and your goals. From ready-made modules to an AI agent built from scratch.
tailored.cardAText: We analyze processes and data to find where AI creates real value, not just experiments.
tailored.cardBText: Agents and workflows built around the way you work, integrated with the systems you already use.
tailored.cardCText: An Italian team that stays by your side: the AI evolves together with your company.

process.title:
From the first call to AI
that works, fast.
process.step1Text: A call to understand your company's processes, documents and numbers. No endless questionnaires.
process.step2Text: We turn on the right modules and train them on your real data, in your secure environment.
process.step3Text: In a short time the AI is live. The first automated workflows run right away, no waiting.
process.step4Text: Finch learns from your work and improves. Add modules when your company is ready.
process.foot: Ongoing support from an Italian team — not a ticket, a person.

news.title:
What's happening
at Finch.
news.lead: Announcements, milestones and product news. A startup that's growing — and sharing the story.
news.card1Title: Finch-AI joins the Partner 24 Ore network
news.card1Text: Our vision on AI for Italian SMEs featured in the Partner 24 Ore special, with a video interview.
news.card2Title: Introducing Synapse, your company's documental brain
news.card2Text: From scattered data to a living, self-maintaining wiki: the new Knowledge Intelligence module, with answers always cited to their source.
news.card3Title: Together with Confindustria L'Aquila for AI in business
news.card3Text: We bring tailored artificial intelligence into the local SME fabric, alongside Confindustria L'Aquila.

talks about Finch.

press.card2Text: The article dedicated to Finch-AI will be online soon. You'll find it here as soon as it's published.

clients.title:
Businesses already
working with Finch.
clients.lead: Italian companies that chose to put artificial intelligence at the center of their processes — and to do it with us.
clients.quote: The first case studies from our clients will be online soon. We're gathering the results of the businesses already working with Finch.

cta.title:
Let's see what AI can do
for your business.
cta.text: Book a 30-minute demo. We'll show you Finch on your own documents and numbers, no commitment.
